response.justification: Bogdan is a strong generalist engineer with 15+ years of experience and solid TypeScript/Node.js foundations, but the role demands 8+ years specifically in AI-driven solution development — a bar he does not meet. His GenAI work is limited to his current role (April 2025–present), covering MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure, which is promising but very recent. More critically, Python is entirely absent from his skill set despite being a primary required language, and there is no evidence of hands-on experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation pipelines. The forward-deployed nature of the role also requires enterprise-facing technical consulting experience that is not demonstrated in his history.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and agentic workflow experience at re:cinq directly aligns with key technologies listed
Proven ability to go deep across the stack (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, cloud infra) and ship production-grade systems
Strong knowledge-sharing track record — workshops, conference talks, and mentoring demonstrate technical leadership potential
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume despite being a primary required language for GenAI/AI pipeline work
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines — core technical competencies for the role
AI/GenAI experience is limited to ~1 month (April 2025) versus the 8-year minimum required; no enterprise customer-facing consulting background demonstrated
